records.question: Which campuses that have related csu_fees, degrees, and faculty records have at least 4021 degrees, have the campus name exactly 'San Jose State University', and have the location exactly 'San Jose'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN faculty ON campuses.id = faculty.campus
WHERE degrees.degrees >= 4021 AND campuses.campus = 'San Jose State University' AND campuses.location = 'San Jose'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Id
FROM Campuses c
JOIN csu_fees cf ON c.Id = cf.Campus
JOIN degrees d ON c.Id = d.Campus
JOIN faculty f ON c.Id = f.Campus
WHERE c.Campus = 'San Jose State University'
  AND c.Location = 'San Jose'
  AND d.Degrees >= 4021

records.question: Which campuses located in Turlock where the county is Stanislaus were established in 1957 and had exactly 395 undergraduate and at most 56 graduate enrollments in 2004, with campus fees of at least 1915 in or before 1996?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus
WHERE discipline_enrollments.graduate <= 56 AND campuses.location = 'Turlock' AND discipline_enrollments.undergraduate = 395 AND discipline_enrollments.year = 2004 AND campuses.year = 1957 AND csu_fees.year <= 1996 AND campuses.county = 'Stanislaus' AND csu_fees.campusfee >= 1915
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Id
FROM Campuses c
JOIN discipline_enrollments de ON c.Id = de.Campus
JOIN csu_fees cf ON c.Id = cf.Campus
WHERE c.Location = 'Turlock'
  AND c.County = 'Stanislaus'
  AND c.Year = 1957
  AND de.Year = 2004
  AND de.Undergraduate = 395
  AND de.Graduate <= 56
  AND cf.Year <= 1996
  AND cf.CampusFee >= 1915

records.question: Which campuses that have recorded CSU fees, degrees, enrollments, and faculty also have CSU fees from the year 1996 with a campus fee at most 1751, at least 2368 degrees awarded, enrollments in the year 1956 with at least 4713 full-time equivalent academic year students, a campus year at least 1947, a location exactly 'Los Angeles', and a county exactly 'Los Angeles'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
JOIN faculty ON campuses.id = faculty.campus
WHERE csu_fees.year = 1996 AND degrees.degrees >= 2368 AND csu_fees.campusfee <= 1751 AND campuses.year >= 1947 AND campuses.location = 'Los Angeles' AND enrollments.fte_ay >= 4713 AND campuses.county = 'Los Angeles' AND enrollments.year = 1956

JOIN degrees d ON c.Id = d.Campus
JOIN enrollments e ON c.Id = e.Campus
JOIN faculty f ON c.Id = f.Campus
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM csu_fees cf2 
    WHERE cf2.Campus = c.Id AND cf2.Year = 1996 AND cf2.CampusFee <= 1751
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM degrees d2 
    WHERE d2.Campus = c.Id AND d2.Degrees >= 2368
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM enrollments e2 
    WHERE e2.Campus = c.Id AND e2.Year = 1956 AND e2.FTE_AY >= 4713
)
AND c.Year >= 1947
AND c.Location = 'Los Angeles'
AND c.County = 'Los Angeles'
